summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Amplify Bloomberg AI Equal Weight ETF (AIVC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is passively managed and invests in an equal-weighted global portfolio of companies engaged in cloud computing, AI hardware, and semiconductors. AIVC was launched on Mar 8, 2016 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

holdings.infoBox: AIVC is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 3.22%, Alibaba Group Holding at 2.91%, Atlassian at 2.70%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 2.53%, and Arista Networks at 2.48%.
